---
title: ""
---

Please review the consultation charges for each specialist below.

---

### Dr. Sajana Aryal  
Consultation per session: NRS 1000/ USD 50

### Biraj Bhattarai  
Consultation per session: NRS 1000/ USD 50

### Dr. Pratik Bhandari  
Consultation per session: NRS 1000/ USD 50

---

## PAYMENT INFORMATION

You can pay online using the following methods:

<a href="#" style="color:#0B4F6C; text-decoration:none;">Fonepay</a>  
<a href="#" style="color:#0B4F6C; text-decoration:none;">Khalti</a>  
<a href="#" style="color:#0B4F6C; text-decoration:none;">eSewa</a>  

**Note:**  
Payment is required before each consultation after booking an appointment.
